limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI spend, headcount, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed in excerpts; only generic statements about current use and potential future investment needs.
ai_narrative_concreteness: No named AI initiatives, deployment details, or quantified outcomes disclosed; language is largely aspirational or risk-framed rather than operational.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and contains company-specific AI risk scenarios with described mechanisms (disintermediation via agentic shopping, competitive disadvantage, cybersecurity intensification, regulatory compliance cost), justifying score 4; however, no quantified risk exposure or named governance body specifically for AI (cybersecurity governance is described but not AI-specific) prevents score 5.
